blocks.text:
**Creating valid JSON**

I’m focusing on crafting a valid JSON string. It’s important to get the formatting right so that it adheres to the correct structure. This means ensuring all the keys are quoted, following the right conventions with commas and colons, and that the values fit appropriately. I’ll need to double-check for syntax errors while building it to avoid any issues later on. Getting this right will save me time down the line!
